summary: Frontend-only testing for the French Weather/Clock iPad app at https://meteo-time.preview.emergentagent.com. All 11 requested features verified end-to-end: weather-screen loads, clock displays HH:MM (01:18) and ticks, French date 'Mercredi 10 Juin' shown, Paris fallback works when geolocation denied, Open-Meteo API integration returns current/24 hourly/7 daily forecasts, hourly scroll shows 'Maintenant' + 'HHh' labels, daily list shows 'Aujourd'hui'/'Jeu'/'Ven'... with min/max + temperature range bar, unit toggle correctly converts 14°C → 57°F and back (14*1.8+32=57.2), city search for 'Lyon' returns results and updates weather to 'Lyon, France 16°', geolocation button is tappable, and iPad-landscape (1024px) renders the two-column layout while phone (375px) stacks vertically. No backend tests run per request (no backend used; Open-Meteo called directly from the client). Console shows only minor RN-web deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, use boxShadow.

issues: Header is overcrowded on narrow viewports (375px): search bar, geolocation button, and °C/°F toggle compete for space and the search input text 'Rechercher une ville…' is partially overlapped/clipped by the unit toggle. App is designed for iPad so this is acceptable, but consider wrapping header to a second row when width<600.
Daily row label 'Aujourd'hui' wraps to two lines on mobile because styles.dailyDay has width:100 — increase width or use minWidth/flex.
City name truncates with ellipsis on narrow screens (e.g. 'Lyon, Fran…') due to fontSize:44 + numberOfLines:1; fine for iPad target.

react_native_issues.issue: RN-web console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Affects styles.resultsBox (shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset) in /app/frontend/app/index.tsx:643-647. Low priority — replace shadow* with boxShadow or guard with Platform.select for web.

action_items: Optional: improve mobile header layout (wrap to 2 rows or shrink chip sizes) so 375px-wide phones don't overlap the search field with the unit toggle.
Optional: widen styles.dailyDay (or remove fixed width:100) so 'Aujourd'hui' doesn't wrap to two lines on small screens.
Optional: replace deprecated shadow* style props in styles.resultsBox with boxShadow (or Platform.select) to silence RN-web warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, single-file, ~825 lines — close to the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting helpers (WEATHER_INFO, fmtTemp, French date utils, OM API calls) into /src/weather/* modules for maintainability.
All interactive elements have proper testIDs and use TouchableOpacity/Pressable correctly. All text is wrapped in <Text>. No HTML elements used.
Open-Meteo is called directly from the client (no backend) — per design. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is set but unused by this screen; that's fine.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All testIDs work as expected. Tested at 375x667 (mobile) and 1024x768 (iPad landscape). Geolocation in browser preview is denied — Paris fallback kicks in as designed. Lyon search successfully changes city. Unit conversion verified (14°C ↔ 57°F). Only cosmetic mobile-layout polish suggestions remain.
